subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from Partner Corp!

I'd be happy to schedule an introductory call to explore potential collaboration. I'm flexible this week, so please feel free to suggest a couple of time slots that work for you and I'll do my best to accommodate.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact details externally. This is a standard policy to protect our team's privacy. The best path forward is for you to reach out through me initially, and I can facilitate introductions to the appropriate stakeholders as the conversation develops.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Assistant
